steps.t: Lord Náin has asked you to speak to his advisors in Járnfast. You should talk to Aldin, Hógur, and Féli.
Lord Náin has asked you to gauge the opinions of the citizens of Járnfast. You should talk to Járnfast citizens.
You should talk to Lord Náin, who can be found at his seat in Járnfast.
The convoy of weapons was coming from Hammerstead, north-west of Járnfast. You should find some sign of the convoy on the path from Hammerstead.
You have found the weapons convoy sacked, and many dwarves dead. You should talk to the survivor, Vílur Strayfoot.
Vílur Strayfoot has warned you that an attack on Hammerstead is imminent! You should travel to Hammerstead!
Hammerstead is under attack by the Easterlings! You should find the captain of the guard, Lóssi.
